title: Miss U Mister
overview: Newlyweds Varun and Kaveri are forced to live apart for 18 months after their financial circumstances lead Varun to take up a job in London. The prolonged parting and the limitations of a long-distance relationship put a strain on their marriage, and matters come to a head when Varun reveals he has taken another 6 months extension in London.
